meaning: adj.喜欢冒险的,敢做敢为的,充满危险的
examples: He had always wanted an adventurous life in the tropics.
This isn't highfalutin art-about-art. It's marvellous and adventurous stuff.
For a more adventurous meal, venture to Moyo in the Melrose Arch neighbourhood.
Pierre-Laurent Aimard is one of the most adventurous and versatile pianists on today's concert scene.
